text: The Texas Department of Transportation shall designate U.S. Highway 90, from the Blue Star rest area southeast of Sanderson to the Val Verde County line, as the Honorable Stillman Dudley Harrison Highway.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 225. State Highway Names
##### § 225.075 — Honorable Stillman Dudley Harrison Highway

The Texas Department of Transportation shall designate U.S. Highway 90, from the Blue Star rest area southeast of Sanderson to the Val Verde County line, as the Honorable Stillman Dudley Harrison Highway.

*Renumbered from Transportation Code, Section225.069 (Ports-to-plains Corridor)by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 87 (S.B.1969), Sec. 27.001(98), eff. September 1, 2009.*

subsections.text: The Texas Department of Transportation shall designate U.S. Highway 90, from the Blue Star rest area southeast of Sanderson to the Val Verde County line, as the Honorable Stillman Dudley Harrison Highway.
